title: The Stoic Challenge
author: From: The Stoic Challenge
content: View every frustration not as a failure, but as a training exercise. Obstacles are not just in the way; they are the way.
action: Action: Reframe a minor annoyance as a deliberate practice.

title: Compound Habits
author: From: Atomic Habits
content: Small changes do not just add up; they compound. A 1% improvement every day results in a 37x improvement over a year.
action: Action: Identify a 'keystone habit' to improve by 1%.

title: The Focus Budget
author: From: Deep Work
content: Attention is a finite resource. If you spend it on shallow tasks, you have nothing left for the work that actually moves the needle.
action: Action: Audit your day for 'shallow' time-wasters.

title: Extreme Ownership
author: From: Extreme Ownership
content: There are no bad teams, only bad leaders. When you stop blaming external factors, you gain total control over the outcome.
action: Action: Accept responsibility for a current project delay.

title: Convexity in Strategy
author: From: Antifragile
content: Seek out strategies where the upside is unlimited and the downside is capped. This is the only way to thrive in uncertain environments.
action: Action: Identify one activity with high upside and fixed risk.
